1650174352.note: Celiac-friendly bakery and cafe in Yeonnam known for gluten-free breads and desserts; confirm daily availability and handling with staff before ordering.

1741203487.note: Gluten-free pizza shop in Hannam (B1) with made-to-order pies; check current wait time and preparation details with staff when visiting.

1056359801.note: Italian restaurant by Cucciolo Group in the Amore Pacific building; verify current gluten-free options and kitchen handling with staff on visit.

1434476104.note: Rice-based fried chicken franchise with multiple branches. Some locations may be delivery-only, so check availability before visiting. Plain fried chicken is typically gluten-free, but many sauces/seasonings (e.g., soy sauce, gochujang-based, teriyaki-style) may contain gluten—confirm ingredients and cross-contact handling with staff before ordering.

1312707678.note: Fully gluten-free cafe in the Pyeongtaek (Godeok) area. Recommended: seasonal fruit cake. Ample parking available. Still confirm any seasonal/menu changes and cross-contact handling with staff on visit.

1218176536.note: Itaewon-area cafe on the 2nd floor (no elevator). They sell both gluten-free and non-gluten-free items, so confirm which products are GF before ordering. Recommended: matcha cake. No parking available. Also confirm preparation/cross-contact handling with staff.

1128289843.note: Cafe near Seoul Forest with limited public gluten-free detail; confirm current options and cross-contact policy directly with staff.

33489623.note: Toujours Dolgama is a village-style stone-kiln bakery complex in Cheonan (large site). It may be difficult to reach by public transport, so check directions in advance. There is a separate shop selling rice-based gluten-free cakes—confirm which items are GF before purchasing. You can buy the cake and then order coffee to enjoy it inside the main area. Ample parking available.

1907181273.note: Dedicated gluten-free cafe in Songridan-gil (near Lotte World) with gluten-free cakes (often rice-flour based). Expect waiting on weekends/holidays. Located on the 2nd floor with no elevator. Confirm current labels and item availability with staff on visit.

1413655852.note: Sinchon-area restaurant with gluten-free brunch options (including pancakes). Staff are attentive to allergies, but confirm specific menu items and kitchen cross-contact handling before ordering. Located on the 2nd floor with no elevator.

1142091847.note: Yongsan cafe listing where GF details are not fully confirmed; verify ingredients and cross-contact precautions with staff at visit time.
